note: Scores are initial routing evidence, not final capability truth. Unknown remains unknown until official docs and current account behavior are verified.

chatgpt.plan: Human-reported Pro top plan, approx 30000 JPY/month; exact plan/features pending account check
chatgpt.recommendation: Use for Architecture / Principle / Evolution Discussion; do not assume browser control until verified.

codex.plan: OpenAI / ChatGPT side in use; exact limits pending account check
codex.recommendation: Use for file edits, Git, implementation, deploy prep, and repo-context validation.

gemini.plan: Human-reported paid middle plan, approx 1600 JPY/month; exact plan/features pending account check
gemini.recommendation: Do not route browser operation by assumption. Verify Gemini plan, Google Workspace integrations, and actual tool capability first.

claude.browser_score: unknown; API computer-use docs exist but current Free UI capability unverified
claude.recommendation: Candidate for review/critique or long document compression after plan and context limits are verified.

browser_agent.plan: Tool-dependent: Codex browser / Chrome plugin / Computer Use / provider API
browser_agent.browser_score: potentially high but unverified per tool/session
browser_agent.recommendation: Use only with Human approval, official docs, constrained scope, and no secret storage.

why: Browser operation capability must be verified from official docs, current plan, and actual available tools.
